ch0114_90_natsume/0101_0701_01_10:
I had a feeling you would come,
[Name:PlayerNickname ].
ch0114_90_natsume/0101_0701_02_10:
I didn’t use my psychic powers. For some
reason, I just knew.
ch0114_90_natsume/7101_0701_01_10:
Up to now, I haven’t really enjoyed
battling...
ch0114_90_natsume/7101_0701_02_10:
But in the Arceus Cup, I truly hoped to win,
from the bottom of my heart.
ch0114_90_natsume/7101_0701_03_10:
Perhaps that shift in mindset helped awaken
my arc suit.
ch0114_90_natsume/7102_0701_01_10:
I’ve been retraining my psychic powers
lately.
ch0114_90_natsume/7102_0701_02_10:
If I don’t keep my mind strong, we’ll hardly
be a sync pair worthy of an arc suit.
ch0114_90_natsume/7102_0701_03_10:
What better way to train my mind and soul
than by practicing my psychic powers?
ch0114_90_natsume/7103_0701_01_10:
My arc suit feels powerful in a strange new
way—different from my psychic powers.
ch0114_90_natsume/7103_0701_02_10:
I never thought I’d be able to transform
during battle, just like Alakazam’s
Mega Evolution.
ch0114_90_natsume/7103_0701_03_10:
It makes the feeling that I’m battling
alongside Alakazam even stronger.
ch0114_90_natsume/7104_0701_01_10: Arc suit changes happen instantly, correct?
ch0114_90_natsume/7104_0701_02_10:
It sure would be nice if costume changes
worked that way.
ch0114_90_natsume/7105_0701_01_10:
You should know our minds are very
different, [Name:PlayerNickname ].
ch0114_90_natsume/7105_0701_02_10:
Even so, it makes me happy to find
similarities buried inside.
ch0114_90_natsume/7105_0701_03_10:
Perhaps experiencing each other’s mind is
what it means to bond with someone.
ch0114_90_natsume/1701_0702_01_10:
I hope this motivates you to catch hold of a
bright future.
ch0114_90_natsume/2501_0701_01_10: The future can be changed, but it’s not easy.
ch0114_90_natsume/2501_0701_02_10:
But when you’re determined to shape your
destiny, even miracles are possible.
ch0114_90_natsume/2501_0701_03_10:
Such strength is within anyone’s grasp, and
it’s far greater than psychic powers.
ch0114_90_natsume/2501_0702_01_10:
If you ever want to change something,
just imagine your ideal future.
ch0114_90_natsume/2501_0702_02_10:
Those thoughts—knowing what you want—
will give you the strength to strive for it.
ch0114_90_natsume/2511_0701_01_10:
I intentionally haven’t looked to see arc suits’
future.
ch0114_90_natsume/2511_0701_02_10:
After all, not knowing what will happen is
more fun, right?
ch0114_90_natsume/2511_0701_03_10: Alakazam and I will find out together!
ch0114_90_natsume/2511_0702_01_10:
I’ve experienced many things here on Pasio,
and each time, I left the future unknown.
ch0114_90_natsume/2511_0702_02_10:
I know it will be fun—BECAUSE I don’t
know it.
ch0114_90_natsume/2511_0702_03_10:
Thinking that way makes me want to try
even harder. Don’t you agree?
ch0114_90_natsume/3001_0701_01_10:
I feel like today will be another fun day.
That’s not a premonition—it’s just what I’m
hoping for.
ch0114_90_natsume/3003_0701_01_10:
Would you like to have lunch? Don’t worry—
I won’t bend spoons or anything like that.
ch0114_90_natsume/3005_0701_01_10:
I’m calm on quiet nights... They’re a good
time to train my mind.
